manufacturer.value: Lucozade Ribena Suntory Limited (UK registered company 08603549), trading as Suntory Beverage & Food GB&I.
manufacturer.note: The registered legal entity is Lucozade Ribena Suntory Limited (Companies House 08603549, incorporated 2013, active); 'Suntory Beverage & Food GB&I' is the public trading identity adopted in 2020. Verified against the statutory register (primary) and the company's corporate site (distinct lineage). Open Food Facts records the legacy brand name. Reclassified from authoritative to corroborable after a re-read found the original single-source pass had not been cross-checked against an independent primary.

passes.checkedValue: Lucozade Ribena Suntory Limited (UK registered company 08603549), trading as Suntory Beverage & Food GB&I.
Lucozade Ribena Suntory Limited (UK registered company 08603549), trading as Suntory Beverage & Food GB&I.

ingredientsText.value: Carbonated Water, Glucose Syrup (13%), Acids (Citric Acid, Lactic Acid), Flavourings, Acidity Regulator (Sodium Citrate), Preservative (Potassium Sorbate), Caffeine, Sweeteners (Sucralose, Acesulfame K), Antioxidant (Ascorbic Acid), Colours (Sunset Yellow, Ponceau 4R), Niacin (B3)
ingredientsText.note: Transcribed from a single Open Food Facts record (tertiary, a low-quality crowd transcription). Open Food Facts records the sweeteners as sucralose with acesulfame K, but a GB retailer label sheet lists aspartame with acesulfame K instead, and the wider list differs in other respects. The sweetener identity is an unresolved discrepancy pending a primary label; a direct manufacturer or retailer label page could not be retrieved (Tesco returned HTTP 403).

sugars.note: Open Food Facts records 4.16g sugars per 100g; the marketed GB label figure is 4.5g per 100ml (a small per-100g versus per-100ml unit difference, not a contradiction).
